name: cli-app
description: Python CLI app with argparse, structured logging, and entry-point setup

files.pyproject.toml:
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=64"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[project]
name = "{{project_name}}"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "{{app_description}}"
requires-python = ">=3.11"

[project.scripts]
{{project_name}} = "{{project_name}}.cli:main"

[tool.setuptools.packages.find]
include = ["{{project_name}}*"]
files.{{project_name}}/cli.py:
"""
{{app_description}}
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import logging
import sys

log = logging.getLogger("{{project_name}}")


def cmd_run(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:
    """Run the main command."""
    print(f"Running with input={args.input}, verbose={args.verbose}")


def main() -> None:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="{{app_description}}")
    parser.add_argument("-v", "--verbose", action="store_true", help="Enable debug output")
    sub = parser.add_subparsers(dest="command", required=True)

    p_run = sub.add_parser("run", help="Run the main command")
    p_run.add_argument("--input", "-i", default=None, help="Input file path")
    p_run.add_argument("--output", "-o", default=None, help="Output file path")
    p_run.set_defaults(func=cmd_run)

    args = parser.parse_args()

    if args.verbose:
        logging.basicConfig(level=logging.DEBUG)

    args.func(args)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
files.{{project_name}}/core.py:

files.tests/test_cli.py:
"""
Tests for CLI commands."""

from __future__ import annotations

from {{project_name}}.cli import cmd_run


class TestRun:
    def test_run_accepts_input(self) -> None:
        args = type("Args", (), {"input": "test.txt", "output": None, "verbose": False})()
        cmd_run(args)  # smoke test — no crash
files.tests/test_core.py:
"""
Tests for core logic."""

from __future__ import annotations

from {{project_name}}.core import process


class TestProcess:
    def test_process_returns_string(self) -> None:
        result = process("data.txt")
        assert "data.txt" in result
